description: Minimal valid harness used as the GREEN baseline for the validators.

features.name: Document import

verification: manual: import sample-docs/ and confirm 3 rows appear
features.evidence: npm run test -- import -> 4 passing; import:start IPC writes library/<id>.json (verified 3 files).

features.name: Grounded QA
